reauth_confirm.title: Reauthenticate Google Calendar Push
reauth_confirm.description: Your Google authentication has expired or is invalid. Please click Submit to re-authenticate with your Google account and issue a new token.

calendars.title: Select Target Calendars
calendars.description:
Please select the Google Calendars you wish to allow this endpoint to modify.

**Instructions:**
1. Only calendars where you have **Writer** or **Owner** permissions are listed.
2. Use the dropdown to check the boxes for specific calendars.
3. If no calendars are selected, the API will be disabled for this account.

aliases.title: Set Endpoint Aliases
aliases.description:
Assign a short, custom endpoint name for each selected calendar.

These will be used in your API URL: `/api/google_calendar_push/<alias>`

**Rules:** Only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores are allowed.

error.invalid_alias: Aliases must contain ONLY lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.
error.duplicate_alias: Each calendar must have a unique alias.

abort.missing_configuration: The component is not configured. Please follow the documentation.
abort.calendar_fetch_failed: Could not fetch the list of calendars from Google API.

init.title: Configure Managed Calendars
init.description: Select which calendars this integration is allowed to access. Only editable calendars are shown.

aliases.title: Set Endpoint Aliases
aliases.description:
Assign a short, custom endpoint name for each selected calendar.

These will be used in your API URL: `/api/google_calendar_push/[alias]`

**Rules:** Only lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores are allowed.

error.invalid_alias: Aliases must contain ONLY lowercase letters, numbers, and underscores.
error.duplicate_alias: Each calendar must have a unique alias.

abort.calendar_fetch_failed: Could not communicate with Google to fetch your calendars. Check your logs.
